scenarios.fixture_contract: A contained initialized repository supplies one valid issue, task, specification, architecture, and document artifact in a single input batch.
required_observations: all five artifacts are routed to canonical kind paths
frontmatter kind and stored path agree after a consecutive update
no feature is created outside the C14 macro-feature contract

scenarios.fixture_contract: A deterministic GitHub adapter fixture has one valid import and one valid export, stable timestamps, IDs, aliases, and snapshots.
required_observations: the first sync applies the expected import and export
the second sync reports imports changes=0 and exports changes=0
stable IDs and snapshots are unchanged on the second run

scenarios.fixture_contract: The feature is confirmed/evaluation-pass/readiness-complete and the package is a valid P01..P13 exact-13 DAG with matching source digest and parent feature.
required_observations: a capability-build task-graph handoff is emitted for the exact-13 package
the handoff remains bound to the feature and source digest
the requirements skill generates no implementation source file

scenarios.fixture_contract: A contained system-spec workspace and the declared system-spec-harness plugin provide all four required entry points, confirmed output, citations, and evaluator PASS.
required_observations: the declared system-spec-harness plugin is loaded and its canonical flow completes
the imported specification and architecture retain source lineage and evaluator evidence
registration occurs only through C02 and no duplicate elicitation or compile logic appears in dev-graph
